stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
On approach, the aircraft's ECAM display shows “Flaps Locked”, but with slats working normally. What will the pilots experience in this case, compared to landing with a clean wing.

options.a: An increased landing distance, as the pilot must use a higher approach speed.
options.b: A higher AoA and increased drag, leading to an increased risk of tailstrike but a shorter landing distance.
options.c: Greater lift production but a lower AoA at CLMAX.
options.d: The aircraft will behave exactly like a clean wing but with more drag.
